hero_sub_line_1: Ximia AI replaces forms, chatbots, and websites that don't convert.

messages.text: Hi, I'm looking to invest my savings.

Great. To find you the best option, I need to define your risk profile:

Are you looking for Immediate Rental Income (finished units with active cash flow) or Capital Appreciation (pre-construction with high revaluation)?
USD rent, as soon as possible.

✅ Profile set: Direct Income Investor.

Orchestrating inventory in high-demand nodes. I've shortlisted units with a projected Yield of 9-15%.

Before showing results, do you have a defined investment ticket for the initial outlay?
I love unit 4B, but I only have $120k in cash.

I have a solution.

With your capital of USD 120k (80% of value), you qualify for our private developer financing:

• Balance: USD 30k
• Term: 24 fixed installments
• Payment: USD 1,250/mo

This is on top of the bank financing we already quoted.

✅ Validated.

Preparing the formal financial simulation and sending it to your email. When you're ready, I'll connect you with the sales team.

Would you prefer a call or to schedule a visit?
Family of 4. We want a house with a backyard.

Logged:
• Family use, 4 people
• Requirement: backyard / green space

Any preferred area, or should I find the best value option?

Got it. I have 6 properties that are an exact match (all 3 beds + garden).

I've ranked them by school proximity and green space ratio.

Shall we validate your budget to move forward with a reservation? 🏡

problem_intro_line1: Generating leads isn't the problem anymore.
problem_intro_line2: It's knowing what to do with them at the exact right moment.
problem_headline: And they already closed with someone else.
problem_stat_caption: of your leads are just noise
problem_flow_without: Lead comes in via WhatsApp or web
Client doesn't qualify or already went cold
problem_flow_with: Lead comes in via WhatsApp or web
Ximia AI validates solvency in 2 min
Human receives a deal ready to close

process_steps.label: 01 · Capture
process_steps.title: Turns natural language into actionable data
process_steps.description: While the user is having a conversation, Ximia interprets intent, context, and needs, transforming every message into structured data without relying on forms.

process_steps.label: 02 · Analyze
process_steps.title: Validates feasibility with deterministic logic
process_steps.description: Extracted data is processed against real financial rules, evaluating purchasing capacity with zero assumptions or guesswork.

process_steps.label: 03 · Decide
process_steps.title: Activates data-driven decisions
process_steps.description: Combines profile, intent, and budget with available inventory to surface only the options that truly fit.

process_steps.label: 04 · Close
process_steps.title: Delivers a sales-ready lead
process_steps.description: The output isn’t a conversation — it’s a complete, validated, and prioritized profile ready for your sales team to act with precision.

stepper_chat_0_user_1: Hi, I want to invest around USD 80k. Any good options?
stepper_chat_0_ai_1:
Excellent initial capital! To focus my search and recommend the best project:

Are you looking for immediate monthly yield (finished units) or do you prefer to maximize appreciation by buying pre-construction?
stepper_chat_1_ai:
Perfect, being debt-free is a very solid starting point for financial planning.

With the profile we've built —freelancer with 15 years of activity and monthly income of USD 12,000 — we can now see how that translates into a real project.

Here is the scenario generated by the system:

Banco Nación is the option that best fits your profile.
• Could grant a loan up to USD 680,000
• With a term of 30 years
• Estimated monthly installment around USD 2,300
stepper_chat_2_ai:
Adding those USD 180,000 to your initial savings, the total budget available would be close to USD 860,000.

Considering you need a house for 5 people, the model that best fits is the HPR03 — Large Family Home.

It's a house with well-defined social spaces and necessary privacy. Its base price is within your calculated budget.

Would you like me to go deeper into the HPR03 details, and design options?

why_ximia_headline: It's not a different prompt. It's a different architecture.
why_ximia_intro: While a human sleeps and a chatbot frustrates, Ximia decides. Our intelligence eliminates friction by processing financial data in real-time, letting your team focus only on closing.
infra_subtitle: Ximia AI is not a monolithic bot. It's an ecosystem of coordinated layers.

infra_layers.function: Translates natural language into actionable data (NLP → JSON).
The brain synchronizing modules and web/CRM integrations.
Executes financial logic on real inventory catalogs.
Maintains the live user profile across sessions.

why_ximia_features.title: Deterministic State Engine
why_ximia_features.description: Unlike FAQ bots that get lost in rigid flows, Ximia AI operates with an autonomous decision engine. It doesn't follow a script; it evaluates the state of the sale and decides the next logical step to advance the deal.

why_ximia_features.title: Real Financial Calculations
why_ximia_features.description: Ximia AI doesn't 'estimate' budgets. It applies banking logic, credit rules, and financial math in real-time. The client receives a technical viability proposal, not a generic response.

why_ximia_features.title: Evolving Structured Profile
why_ximia_features.description: Information is not saved as dead text. We build a client 'data object' that accumulates and refines with every message. Ximia AI never repeats a question and never loses the context of the operation.

why_ximia_features.title: The Sales Team Partner
why_ximia_features.description: We don't replace the salesperson; we empower them. Ximia AI delivers Class A leads with all their structured information, reducing team burnout and drastically raising the average closing rate.

stack_subtitle: We integrate the best tech stack according to your ecosystem:
cta_headline: Don’t scale your team. Scale your closing capacity.
cta_subheadline: Ximia generates and qualifies leads 24/7, prioritizes real opportunities, and frees your team to focus on closing deals instead of filtering contacts.
